title: Bridge Essay: Spectral dynamic causal modeling of mindfulness, mind-wandering, and resting-sta

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Non-fabrication — spontaneous thought, mind-wandering, creative insight, DMN.

**Spectral dynamic causal modeling of mindfulness, mind-wandering, and resting-state in the triple network using fMRI.**. Neuroreport.. PMID: 35287148. DOI: 10.1097/WNR.0000000000001772. OBJECTIVE: Functional connectivity in intrinsic brain networks, namely, the triple network, which includes the salience network, default mode network (DMN) and central executive network (CEN), has been suggested as prominent, major networks involved in human cognition and mental state-mindfulness, mind-wandering and resting-state.
